text: Seeing the group inside the glass-walled room, I feel like an observer—separate yet connected by curiosity. There’s a sense of modernity and order, a quiet hum of collective purpose inside that meeting. In contrast, when I’m in front of the vibrant R+D wall, surrounded by words and symbols of innovation, I feel invigorated. The space tells a story of progress and collaboration. I’m reminded of the continual search for meaning, both solitary and shared, in environments built for thinking and discovery.
